name: Scallop or Shrimp Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion, apple, garlic, and curry powder in margarine until tender.
2. Remove the skillet from heat and blend in flour, salt, cardamom, and pepper.
3. Stir in chicken broth and lime juice until the curry sauce is well blended.
4. Bring the curry sauce to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, uncovered for about 5 minutes. Stir occasionally.
5. Meanwhile, place scallops or shrimp in a pot of boiling water and cook until just tender (5-10 minutes). Drain and set aside.
6. When the curry sauce is finished cooking, add shellfish and mushrooms and serve over rice.
